Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2025-01-01 • Version: 1.0

This is a placeholder Privacy Policy. Replace this content with your actual policy text covering what data you collect, purposes, legal bases (GDPR/UK GDPR), sharing/processing, retention, user rights, contact details, and international transfers.

You can manage cookies at any time using the “Cookie preferences” link in the footer.
